headline: Is Thermo Fisher (TMO) Quietly Redefining Its Edge With AI-Enabled, End-to-End Biopharma Tools?
summary: Earlier this week, Thermo Fisher Scientific used the BIO International Convention 2026 in San Diego to showcase new Orbitrap mass spectrometry upgrades, AI-powered software, and integrated laboratory solutions aimed at supporting complex research and biopharma development workflows. The company’s decision to spotlight end-to-end, AI-enabled capabilities across pharma services and bioproduction underlines its ambition to be a single, integrated partner for drug development from discovery...

headline: Q1 Earnings Highlights: Thermo Fisher (NYSE:TMO) Vs The Rest Of The Research Tools & Consumables Stocks
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who didn’t). Let’s take a look at how research tools & consumables stocks fared in Q1, starting with Thermo Fisher (NYSE:TMO).

headline: Veeva Introduces New EHS Application for Proactive Risk Management and Intelligent Automation
summary: Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today announced Veeva EHS, a new application in Veeva Quality Cloud for environmental, health, and safety. With Veeva EHS, manufacturing and testing sites can proactively identify, manage, and mitigate operational and environmental risks and ensure global compliance readiness.
